coreFormula.latex: a_{n+1}-a_n \begin{cases} >0 &\iff \{a_n\} \text{ дёҘж јйҖ’еўһ}, \\ =0 &\iff \{a_n\} \text{ дёәеёёж•°еҲ—}, \\ <0 &\iff \{a_n\} \text{ дёҘж јйҖ’еҮҸ}. \end{cases} \quad (\text{е·®жҜ”жі•}) \qquad \frac{a_{n+1}}{a_n} \begin{cases} >1 &\iff \{a_n\} \text{ дёҘж јйҖ’еўһ}, \\ =1 &\iff \{a_n\} \text{ дёәеёёж•°еҲ—}, \\ <1 &\iff \{a_n\} \text{ дёҘж јйҖ’еҮҸ}. \end{cases} \quad (\text{е•ҶжҜ”жі•, йңҖ } a_n>0)
$l \perp a,\; l \perp b,\; a \cap b = P,\; a \subset \alpha,\; b \subset \alpha \Rightarrow l \perp \alpha$

\begin{cases} a\parallel b,\ a\not\subset\alpha,\ b\subset\alpha \Rightarrow a\parallel\alpha\\ a,b\subset\alpha,\ a\cap b=P,\ a\parallel\beta,\ b\parallel\beta \Rightarrow \alpha\parallel\beta\\ \alpha\parallel\beta,\ \gamma\cap\alpha=a,\ \gamma\cap\beta=b \Rightarrow a\parallel b\\ a\parallel\alpha,\ a\subset\beta,\ \alpha\cap\beta=b \Rightarrow a\parallel b \end{cases}
